title: Starcraft Patch 1.23.9.9899 Notes
brief_html:
[post from Cydra on Starcraft Forums]
Greetings all,
content_html:
[post from Cydra on Starcraft Forums]
Greetings all,

Patch 1.23.9 has arrived!

Welcome to Season 10!

  • Dark Archon portrait and Protoss frame rewards for ranked matchmaking S, A, B, and U.

Map Pool Update

  • (2) Eclipse 1.2
  • (3) Ascension 1.0
  • (4) Fighting Spirit 1.3
  • (4) Good Night 1.31
  • (4) Largo 1.5
  • (4) Polypoid 1.65
  • (4) Revolver 1.0

(Note: For the first two weeks, ranks will be MMR bucketed based on last season’s data. After which we will switch to the percentage-based breakdown above.)

comments.content_html: When Season 11? 11 month with Season 10 amp pool. Who decide this? Where can we vote or make a forum?
@manu18s, I suggest directing your inquiry to Blizzard's forums: https://us.forums.blizzard.com/en/starcraft/
